narrative:
Beavercreek 034 (precinct in Greene County) has 826 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
